query:
SELECT `stationCode`, `productStatus`, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM products
WHERE `poNumber` = 'PO-20260512-03'
GROUP BY `stationCode`, `productStatus`
ORDER BY `stationCode`, `productStatus`;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT `stationCode`, `productStatus`, COUNT(*) AS row_count
